title: ruscus hyrcanus
intro: Ruscus hyrcanus, also known as the Caspian Ruscus or Persian Ruscus, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asparagaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ruscus hyrcanus are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, improve circulation, and reduce edema. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions to treat various health conditions.
